name: CATERPILLAR INC
summary: Caterpillar Inc. is the world's leading manufacturer of construction and mining equipment, off-highway diesel and natural gas engines, industrial gas turbines, and diesel-electric locomotives. Operating through four reportable segments—Construction Industries, Resource Industries, Power & Energy, and Financial Products—the company serves infrastructure, mining, oil and gas, power generation, marine, and rail markets globally, supported by Cat Financial for equipment financing and leasing, and a large independent dealer network.

products.name: Track Excavators
products.description: Mini, small, medium, and large track excavators for construction and mining applications.

products.name: Wheel Loaders
products.description: Compact, small, and medium wheel loaders for construction and industrial use.

products.name: Off-Highway Trucks
products.description: Large mining trucks and wide-body trucks for surface mining operations.

products.name: Hydraulic Shovels
products.description: Heavy-duty shovels for surface mining and quarry applications.

products.name: Electric Rope Shovels
products.description: High-capacity shovels for large-scale surface mining operations.

products.name: Draglines
products.description: Large excavating machines used in surface mining operations.

products.name: Rotary Drills
products.description: Drilling equipment for surface mining applications.

products.name: Reciprocating Engine-Powered Generator Sets
products.description: Power generation systems for industrial, marine, and oil and gas industries.

products.name: Turbines and Centrifugal Gas Compressors
products.description: Turbines and compressors serving oil and gas and electric power generation markets.

products.name: Diesel-Electric and Hybrid Locomotives
products.description: Rail locomotives and components for rail industry customers.

products.name: Electrified Powertrain and Zero-Emission Power Sources
products.description: Zero-emission and electrified power solutions under development for industrial applications.

products.name: Asphalt Pavers
products.description: Paving machines for road construction and infrastructure projects.

products.name: Motor Graders
products.description: Grading machines for road construction and maintenance.

products.name: SEM Brand Machines
products.description: Differentiated construction machines targeting customers in developing economies.

products.name: Cat Financial Loans
products.description: Equipment purchase financing with structured payments, typically secured by equipment.

products.name: Cat Financial Leases
products.description: Non-tax finance leases and tax leases for Caterpillar equipment customers and dealers.

products.name: Revolving Charge Accounts
products.description: Revolving credit accounts for parts, services, and rentals at Caterpillar dealers.

products.name: Fleet and Equipment Management Analytics
products.description: Technology products providing fleet management, analytics, and autonomous machine capabilities for mining.

products.name: Remanufactured Engines and Components
products.description: Remanufacturing of Caterpillar engines and components, plus remanufacturing services for third parties.
